violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The refrigerator in the basement was observed with an ambient temperature of 51 degrees. PIC adjusted temperature; ambient temperature began to decrease during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The area for storing garbage cans was observed with an accumulation of tarps, furniture, and other debris. Refuse areas must be maintained clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
